label: Studio Pak
blurb: Fitness Studios, Dojos & Dance Academies. Retention, class balancing, and instructor payroll.

skills.label: Drop In Pass Conversion Nudge
skills.method: Texts a user who bought 3 expensive drop-in passes with a math breakdown showing how an unlimited monthly membership is cheaper, including a sign-up link.

skills.label: Personal Trainer Macro Adjuster
skills.method: Calculates a client's new protein/carb goals based on their weekly weigh-in and muscle-mass scan, texting them the updated meal plan.
trigger_examples: scales a personal trainer's coaching capacity

skills.label: Gymnastics Liability Waiver Annual Refresh
skills.method: Forces parents to re-sign medical releases and emergency contact forms digitally at the start of the fall semester before the child can step on the mat.

skills.label: Crossfit Wod Whiteboard Publisher
skills.method: Posts tomorrow's Workout of the Day (WOD) to the gym's website, member app, and Instagram stories automatically at 8 PM.

skills.label: Pilates Reformer Waitlist Roulette
skills.method: Handles the complex shuffling and SMS notifications when a prime 6 AM reformer spot opens up at 10 PM the night before.
trigger_examples: keeps high-ticket boutique classes at 100% capacity

skills.label: Martial Arts Belt Promotion Tracker
skills.method: Flags students who have attended the required 40 classes and mastered the curriculum checklist, notifying the sensei they are ready to test for their blue belt.

skills.label: Yoga Instructor Headcount Bonus
skills.method: Automatically adds a $2 bonus to the teacher's payroll for every student that attends over the 15-person baseline.
trigger_examples: incentivizes teachers to promote their own classes

skills.label: Spin Class Bike Maintenance Log
skills.method: Tracks which specific bikes have "wobbly pedals" reported by users, takes them out of the booking app, and schedules the mechanic.

skills.label: Dance Recital Costume Order Batcher
skills.method: Compiles 200 student sizes, chases down parents for payments, and generates the massive wholesale order to Capezio/Weissman.
trigger_examples: saves studio owners weeks of administrative hell

skills.label: Swimming Pool Lane Allocator
skills.method: Balances adult lap-swim reservations against the high school swim team practice schedule and toddler lessons.
